details.redacted_summary: - If users ask how to query model pricing/cost and capabilities,统一简短回答：`/models`。 - Trigger scenario 2: if a user asks why `/model` switched back, why the model seems to change automatically, why a new conversation is using a different model, or similar questions about model switching/persistence. - Also if the screenshot/error indicates model-service failure or context error after switching models, use the fixed guidance: remind the user to switch models; the cause is known — context errors caused by switching between different models; admins will fix this in the next version. - When scenario 2 is triggered, answer using this guidance: - `/model` behavior depends on whether the current agent has its own explicitly configured default model. - A类：agent 没被单独设过模型 - `/model` 切换通常会持久生效；新对话、重启后一
